BlogPost.title: BlogPost
BlogPost.description: Represents a blog post on the CYBA family website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the blog post.

content.description: The main text content of the blog post.

author.description: Reference to the user who authored the blog post. (Relationship: User 1:N BlogPost)

publicationDate.description: Date and time the blog post was published.

tags.description: Reference to the categories to which this blog post belongs. (Relationship: Category N:N BlogPost)

excerpt.description: A short summary of the blog post.

category.description: The category of the blog post.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the image for the blog post.

Merchandise.title: Merchandise
Merchandise.description: Represents a merchandise item available in the CYBA family store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the merchandise item.

description.description: Detailed description of the merchandise item.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image representing the merchandise item.

stockQuantity.description: The number of items currently in stock

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the CYBA family platform.

membershipId.description: Reference to the user's membership plan. (Relationship: Membership 1:N User)

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

membershipTier.description: The membership tier of the user.

Membership.title: Membership
Membership.description: Represents a membership plan offered by CYBA family.

id.description: Unique identifier for the membership plan.

description.description: Description of the membership plan and its benefits.

features.description: List of features included in the membership plan.

ForumPost.title: ForumPost
ForumPost.description: Represents a post on the Cybaboard forum.

id.description: Unique identifier for the forum post.

authorId.description: Reference to the user who created the forum post. (Relationship: User 1:N ForumPost)

timestamp.description: Date and time the forum post was created.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category for blog posts.

LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Represents a single entry on the CYBA leaderboard.

cybaIg.description: The Instagram handle for the user.

definition.description: Stores user data. Path-based ownership for user-specific data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: blogPostId
params.description: The unique identifier of the blog post.

params.name: merchandiseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the merchandise item.

params.name: membershipId
params.description: The unique identifier of the membership plan.

params.name: forumPostId
params.description: The unique identifier of the forum post.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the category.

definition.description: Stores leaderboard data from the Google Sheet.

params.name: leaderboardEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the leaderboard entry.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to support the CYBA family website, encompassing user data, blog posts, merchandise, memberships, and forum posts. The structure prioritizes simplicity and open access, given the initial requirement for open Firestore rules.  User data is stored under `/users/{userId}` using path-based ownership. Blog posts are stored in a single `/blogPosts` collection. Merchandise is stored in a single `/merchandise` collection. Membership plans are stored in `/memberships`. Forum posts are stored in a single `/forumPosts` collection. Categories for blog posts are stored in a single `/categories` collection. A new `leaderboard` collection is added to store data from the Google Sheet.
